title: urachne ramosa
intro: Urachne ramosa, also known as the stick bush or stick bush tree, is a type of plant native to Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Urachne ramosa include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Urachne ramosa can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or by using the plant's roots in traditional remedies.
